title: Track prefix egress across route rebuilds
description: Prefix route entries retain only a path, not their egress identity. DAO reparenting or finite host-route expiry can leave a prefix route using a stale source path. Retain enough egress metadata to recompute or invalidate prefix routes atomically during rebuild.
close_reason: Updated RouteEntry to retain egress metadata (rust/lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:190-196,200-217); added rebuild test coverage; full tests + clippy pass; atomic rebuild + MAX_ROUTES preserved; stale paths avoided on reparent/expiry
